headlines.title: How the Visa-Mastercard card fee case may end
headlines.summary: A federal court is likely to weigh how much a proposed settlement over interchange fees differs from a pact that was rejected two years ago.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Drones & Robotics AI Summit 2026: Entering the quantum era of autonomy
headlines.summary: Heven AeroTech founder and CEO Bentzion Levinson explains how his startup has addressed drone navigation and communications in GPS-denied environments.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: RBR50 Gala returns in the 2026 Robotics Summit & Expo
headlines.summary: The RBR50 gala at the 2026 Robotics Summit & Expo offers a chance to honor and connect with the world’s leading robotics innovators.

headlines.title: Fail fast, fail small, fail safe: A practical model for robotic automation
headlines.summary: In testing robotic systems, developers can fail and learn, as long as they control risk, explains Bullen Ultrasonics' research and early innovation manager.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.

political_items.title: Trump says US will not lift Hormuz blockade until deal made with Iran
political_items.summary: The US president's comments come amid uncertainty over whether Iran will attend peace talks in Pakistan this week.
